message:
test(render): add raw mode to emit_style benchmark

Add FTUI_EMIT_STYLE_BENCH_MODE environment variable to presenter tests:
- When set to "raw": skip JSONL output, accumulate timing in black_box
  sink for pure performance measurement without I/O overhead
- Default mode: emit JSONL lines for detailed per-iteration analysis

This allows profiling the emit_style benchmark with minimal measurement
overhead when investigating style emission performance characteristics.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
